name: Story - Self Seeds
description: Parallel personal-story seeds for character generation. Used as a secondary narrative thread from adolescence onward.

results.description: A family inheritance dispute fastened itself to your own future, until your name began appearing wherever the claim was discussed.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: An inheritance matter stopped being something older relatives argued over and became a question of what might one day be yours.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: You came to understand that old claims on land, money, or name would shape how others measured your prospects.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: The inheritance question ceased to be a family complaint and became part of the account others kept of your likely future.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: An old feud ceased to belong only to the household and began shaping how others addressed you in your own right.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: You discovered that a quarrel older than you could still narrow your prospects before you had even chosen your own enemies.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: Other people's memory of the feud reached you before your own judgment did, which is one way old conflicts renew themselves.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: The inherited quarrel began turning ordinary encounters into tests of whether you would continue it, soften it, or fail it.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: A patron's old claim on your household began extending toward you personally, in tones too courteous to refuse outright.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: Protection once given to your family became a personal obligation the moment you seemed useful enough to call upon.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: You learned that patronage offered to your elders had already been entered into a ledger where your own name would soon appear.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: The courtesy once shown your household revealed itself as a claim on your future conduct the moment you started to matter.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: A household scandal began shadowing you by association, long before anyone trusted you with the whole account.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: Something once buried in family history started to cling to your own name, whether you understood it fully or not.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: You found that other people knew enough of the old scandal to judge your family without knowing enough to judge fairly.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: Childhood whispers hardened into the introductions by which others first placed you, whether they repeated the story aloud or not.
results.name: buried-scandal
